skill.name: ui-design-system
skill.description: The Design System, Theme, and UX rules for the Physical AI Hub.
skill.summary: The Design System, Theme, and UX rules for the Physical AI Hub.
skill.author: AbdulSamad94

security_audit.summary: The static external command findings are false positives caused by Markdown inline code around CSS values and file paths. The weak cryptography findings are false positives from normal design-system text, not cryptographic code. No prompt injection, scripts, network access, filesystem operations, or executable commands were found.

content.user_title: Apply Physical AI UI Design Rules
content.value_statement: Teams need consistent visual rules when building Physical AI Hub interfaces. This skill gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code clear theme, typography, component, and animation guidance.
actual_capabilities: Defines the Physical AI Hub visual direction as premium, modern, dark, and futuristic.
Specifies Poppins typography with regular, medium, semi-bold, and bold weights.
Provides dark mode color guidance for backgrounds, accents, text, and borders.
Describes button, card, input, and dropdown styling conventions.
Documents animation names and transition timing for interface polish.
Identifies CSS locations used for global, Docusaurus, and module styles.
limitations: It provides design guidance only and does not include implementation code.
It does not define accessibility contrast targets or responsive breakpoints.
It does not include component screenshots, tokens, or reusable assets.
It is tailored to the Physical AI Hub visual identity.

use_cases.title: Style a New Feature
use_cases.description: Apply the approved colors, typography, and component treatments while adding a new interface area.

use_cases.title: Review Interface Consistency
use_cases.description: Check whether existing screens follow the expected dark mode theme and component style.

use_cases.title: Align Documentation Styling
use_cases.description: Update Docusaurus or module styles so product documentation matches the application theme.

prompt_templates.title: Apply Basic Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ui-design-system skill to style this screen with the Physical AI Hub dark theme.

prompt_templates.title: Refine Components
prompt_templates.prompt: Review these buttons, cards, inputs, and dropdowns against the ui-design-system skill and suggest focused improvements.

prompt_templates.title: Create CSS Guidance
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ui-design-system skill to plan CSS updates for globals, Docusaurus overrides, and component modules.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Product UI
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this interface against the ui-design-system skill and prioritize fixes for theme, typography, components, and animations.

output_examples.input: Make the dashboard match the Physical AI Hub design system.
output_examples.output: Recommended changes include a dark gradient background, teal accent buttons, off-white body text, glassmorphism cards, and smooth hover transitions.

output_examples.input: Review this dropdown style for consistency.
output_examples.output: The dropdown should feel floating, use subtle depth, animate with a slide-in effect, and stay aligned with the dark theme.

output_examples.input: Where should these theme updates go?
output_examples.output: Global theme changes belong in the global CSS file. Docusaurus overrides and complex component modules should stay in their dedicated style files.

best_practices: Use the documented palette and typography before adding new visual tokens.
Keep component styling consistent across buttons, cards, inputs, and dropdowns.
Place global, documentation, and module-specific CSS in the documented locations.
anti_patterns: Do not mix unrelated typefaces with the documented Poppins direction.
Do not introduce bright light-theme surfaces into the primary dark mode experience.
Do not use abrupt animations that conflict with the smooth transition guidance.

faq.question: What does this skill help design?
faq.answer: It helps design Physical AI Hub interfaces with a consistent dark, modern, premium visual style.

faq.question: Does it generate complete components?
faq.answer: No. It provides design and CSS guidance, not complete component source code.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: It supports Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Does it include accessibility rules?
faq.answer: No. Teams should add explicit accessibility checks for contrast, focus states, and motion preferences.

faq.question: Can it guide Docusaurus styling?
faq.answer: Yes. It identifies a Docusaurus custom CSS file for documentation theme overrides.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed file contains only design guidance and no executable commands or network behavior.
